subcodes.first_line: The denizens of Paradise have chanted, in sacred melodies, that unique and resplendent ode, that eloquent and matchless gem [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد رتل اهل الفردوس بالحان القدس تلک القصیده الفریده الغراء الفصحی التی خریده
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @Manifestation of God as sun, @praise and encouragement, @the concourse on high
